config.greeting-key.name: Greeting Key
config.search-radius.name: Greeting Distance
config.search-radius.desc: Max tiles for villagers to hear you (default 7).
config.allow-greeting-talked.name: Allow Interacting
config.allow-greeting-talked.desc: Greet even if talked to today.
config.turn-delay.name: NPC Turn Delay
config.turn-delay.desc: Seconds before NPC turns to look.
config.bubble-delay.name: NPC Bubble Delay
config.cooldown.name: Greeting Cooldown
config.always-respond.name: Always Respond
config.always-respond.desc: If on, NPCs will always respond to your greeting regardless of friendship level.
